Comment: TruClaw escalation workflow. STANDARD state machine type (not Express -- Express doesn't support .waitForTaskToken at all, confirmed via a failed deploy). Started async (StartExecution) by interceptor/handler.py on ESCALATE, which then polls DescribeExecution in a bounded loop rather than blocking on a single synchronous call, since Standard has no StartSyncExecution API. This JSON file is a hand-maintained reference matching what infra/cdk/truclaw_stack.py actually builds via CDK constructs -- CDK does not load this file directly, so keep both in sync by hand if either changes.
